description_long: This recliner features a modern, ergonomic design with a deep blue upholstered seat and backrest, complemented by a light gray structural frame. The seat is equipped with a pair of seatbelts, suggesting its use in transportation or public seating environments. The backrest includes a headrest area with a slightly raised, padded section and a contrasting blue panel. The rear of the recliner displays a foldable tray table, a storage pocket, and an integrated screen, indicating amenities for user comfort and convenience. Both armrests are robust, with one side housing visible control buttons, likely for reclining or other adjustments. The overall construction appears sturdy, with metal supports and a combination of soft and hard surfaces for durability and comfort.
description: A modern blue recliner with a padded seat, integrated tray table, and control-equipped armrest, set on a sturdy gray frame.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue padded seat and backrest, seatbelts, and one armrest with visible controls.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the reclined profile, thick cushioning, and the extended tray table at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the tray table, storage pocket, and an integrated screen on the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the armrest design and the structural support beneath the seat.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are broad and rectangular, with a smooth plastic finish and integrated control buttons on one side. They appear to be lightly padded for comfort and structurally robust.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single continuous piece with a visually distinct, slightly raised headrest section at the top.
